results.prompt:
I'm getting these weird super thin report sections sometimes, like the model
clearly started the section but then it kind of gives up and we get a shallow
stub instead of a real writeup. I first thought the model was just being lazy,
but it feels too consistent for that. I've tried tweaking prompts and it still
happens. Can you trace what in this codebase could cause that behavior?
bash_commands: codeir show CRCTNSFFCNTTL && codeir expand CRCTNSFFCNTTL
codeir_commands: codeir show CRCTNSFFCNTTL && codeir expand CRCTNSFFCNTTL

codeir_invocations.command: codeir show CRCTNSFFCNTTL && codeir expand CRCTNSFFCNTTL
codeir_invocations.subject: CRCTNSFFCNTTL

codeir_invocations.command: codeir show CRCTNSFFCNTTL && codeir expand CRCTNSFFCNTTL
codeir_invocations.subject: CRCTNSFFCNTTL

results.final_response:
Most likely yes: this is code-path behavior, not just prompt quality.

Key places that can produce “thin/stub” sections:

1. Premature accept of non-final text  
[report_agent.py:1470](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_i4m6c7_k/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1470) to [report_agent.py:1500](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_i4m6c7_k/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1500)  
Once `tool_calls_count >= 3`, if model output has neither tool call nor `Final Answer:`, code directly accepts it as final section (`final_answer = response.strip()` + `return`).  
So a short transition sentence can become the whole section.

2. Very tight ReACT budget + forced one-shot ending  
[report_agent.py:1285](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_i4m6c7_k/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1285), [report_agent.py:1286](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_i4m6c7_k/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1286), [report_agent.py:1502](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_i4m6c7_k/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1502) to [report_agent.py:1519](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_i4m6c7_k/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1519)  
`max_iterations=5`, `min_tool_calls=3`. If the model spends turns on tools/format retries, final writing gets squeezed into a rushed fallback response.

3. No truncation/finish_reason handling in LLM wrapper  
[llm_client.py:64](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_i4m6c7_k/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/utils/llm_client.py:64) to [llm_client.py:68](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_i4m6c7_k/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/utils/llm_client.py:68)  
`chat()` returns content only; it ignores `finish_reason`. If completion is cut (token limit), truncated partial section is accepted as normal.

4. Forced-final prompt text is misleading in one branch  
[report_agent.py:824](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_i4m6c7_k/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:824) + [report_agent.py:1502](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_i4m6c7_k/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1502)  
When loop limit is hit, it tells model “tool limit reached” even if that’s not true, which can trigger short compliance text instead of full writeup.

If you want, I can patch this to add a quality gate (min length/structure), require explicit `Final Answer` before accept, and handle `finish_reason` so cut-off responses are retried instead of saved.

results.prompt:
Users keep asking why the final report can't include agent interviews after
the simulation is already over. We do have an interview_agents tool, so
everyone assumes this should work, but in practice it seems flaky or maybe
impossible. I can't tell if this is actually broken or just designed in a way
that makes the request invalid. Can you look into what is happening when
report generation uses agent interviews after a sim has ended?
bash_commands: codeir search report generation interview_agents simulation ended final report
rg -n "interview_agents|TOOL_DESC_INTERVIEW_AGENTS|simulation.*end|结束|expired|include_expired|工具" backend/app/services/report_agent.py backend/app/services/zep_tools.py backend/app/api/simulation.py
codeir search check_env_alive SimulationRunner.end stop close wait command mode
rg -n "env_status|_update_env_status\(|status\": \"alive\"|status\": \"stopped\"|CLOSE_ENV|check_env_alive|waiting command|等待命令" backend/scripts backend/app/services | head -n 200
codeir search generate_report report api simulation_id graph_id
codeir_commands: codeir search report generation interview_agents simulation ended final report
codeir search check_env_alive SimulationRunner.end stop close wait command mode
codeir search generate_report report api simulation_id graph_id

codeir_invocations.command: codeir search report generation interview_agents simulation ended final report
codeir_invocations.subject: report generation interview_agents simulation ended final report

codeir_invocations.command: codeir search check_env_alive SimulationRunner.end stop close wait command mode
codeir_invocations.subject: check_env_alive SimulationRunner.end stop close wait command mode

codeir_invocations.command: codeir search generate_report report api simulation_id graph_id
codeir_invocations.subject: generate_report report api simulation_id graph_id

results.final_response:
What’s happening is a mix of “invalid request after shutdown” plus error-handling that makes it look flaky.

1. `interview_agents` is only valid while the sim environment is still alive
- The interview path explicitly requires a live IPC env and rejects closed envs: [simulation_runner.py:1519](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/simulation_runner.py:1519), [simulation_runner.py:1520](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/simulation_runner.py:1520).
- API docs also say interview requires “sim completed and in waiting-command mode”: [simulation.py:2271](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/api/simulation.py:2271), [simulation.py:2361](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/api/simulation.py:2361).
- So: “simulation rounds are over but env still waiting” = valid. “simulation fully stopped/closed” = invalid by design.

2. Report generation still exposes/interprets `interview_agents` as a normal tool
- Report always defines `interview_agents` as available: [report_agent.py:945](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:945).
- Section generation enforces 3+ tool calls and includes `interview_agents` in the tool set/hints: [report_agent.py:1286](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1286), [report_agent.py:1289](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1289), [report_agent.py:714](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:714).
- Report API does not gate generation on env liveness: [report.py:25](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/api/report.py:25).

3. Why users perceive “flaky” instead of “hard invalid”
- Interview failures are swallowed into text, not hard-failed:
  - Tool executor catches exceptions and returns `"工具执行失败: ..."` string: [report_agent.py:1059](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1059).
  - `ZepToolsService.interview_agents` catches `ValueError`/generic errors and returns summary text: [zep_tools.py:1462](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/zep_tools.py:1462), [zep_tools.py:1467](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/zep_tools.py:1467).
- So report continues, but interview content is missing/poor, which feels intermittent.

4. Real reliability gap
- Liveness check is file-based (`env_status.json == "alive"`): [simulation_ipc.py:270](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/simulation_ipc.py:270), [simulation_ipc.py:283](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/simulation_ipc.py:283).
- If process is force-killed, stale “alive” can happen; then command send times out: [simulation_ipc.py:117](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/simulation_ipc.py:117), [simulation_ipc.py:187](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/simulation_ipc.py:187), [simulation_runner.py:772](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_u0gxoyzb/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/simulation_runner.py:772).

Bottom line: after sim env is actually closed, interview-in-report is not supported by design. The “flaky” part comes from soft failure handling and a weak liveness check, not from a single broken endpoint.

If you want, I can patch this so report generation disables `interview_agents` when env is not alive and surfaces a clear deterministic message instead of letting the LLM stumble through tool errors.

results.final_response:
You’re right: it is intentionally serialized in several places.

What it’s waiting on now:
- One background thread does the whole report end-to-end (`threading.Thread(target=run_generate)`), so each report is a single worker pipeline: [report.py:174](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/api/report.py:174)
- Report generation is strictly section-by-section (`for i, section in enumerate(...)`), not parallel: [report_agent.py:1636](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1636)
- Each section depends on prior sections (`previous_sections=generated_sections`), so later sections wait for earlier output context: [report_agent.py:1659](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1659)
- ReACT loop adds “ceremony” by design: min 3 tool calls, max 5 iterations, and one tool call per turn: [report_agent.py:1285](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1285), [report_agent.py:1286](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1286), [report_agent.py:1419](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1419), [report_agent.py:646](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:646), [report_agent.py:735](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:735)
- Tool calls themselves are often multi-step and synchronous (e.g., `insight_forge` loops subqueries serially; retries sleep with backoff): [zep_tools.py:996](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/zep_tools.py:996), [zep_tools.py:457](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/zep_tools.py:457)

If you parallelize more, what changes/breaks:
- Section coherence will change first. Current logic explicitly uses prior section text to prevent repetition and maintain flow; parallel sections lose that ordering guarantee: [report_agent.py:1659](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1659)
- Progress semantics break unless redesigned. Progress is computed from section index in a linear loop; parallel completion causes jumps/backtracking: [report_agent.py:1641](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1641), [report_agent.py:1689](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1689)
- Log and “completed_sections” ordering become non-deterministic without synchronization: [report_agent.py:1670](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1670), [report_agent.py:2199](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:2199)
- Backend load/error profile will change. More concurrent LLM/Zep/interview calls means more rate-limit/retry amplification.
- Interview path can still bottleneck: IPC command processing is one-command-at-a-time with 0.5s polling, and batch interview handles twitter then reddit sequentially: [run_parallel_simulation.py:560](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/scripts/run_parallel_simulation.py:560), [run_parallel_simulation.py:1616](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/scripts/run_parallel_simulation.py:1616), [run_parallel_simulation.py:469](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/scripts/run_parallel_simulation.py:469), [run_parallel_simulation.py:496](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_yhopvb1b/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/scripts/run_parallel_simulation.py:496)

Bottom line: the slowness is mostly architectural and policy-driven, not accidental. You can parallelize, but you’re trading determinism/coherence/progress semantics for speed unless you redesign those contracts too.

results.prompt:
We want to add one more report-generation tool that calls an external
analytics API. Would that be complicated? Before we wire it in, can you look
through this codebase and tell me what would actually have to change?
results.final_response:
Short answer: not very complicated. It’s a localized change, mostly in the report agent layer.

What would need to change:

- Add an analytics client/service for the external API (auth, timeout, retry, response normalization), likely as a new service file.
  - [backend/app/services](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_lb36j5_z/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services)

- Wire new config/env vars (API key/base URL/timeout) and validation.
  - [config.py:30](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_lb36j5_z/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/config.py:30)

- Register the new report tool in `ReportAgent` in all hardcoded tool points:
  - tool description constants
  - `_define_tools` list
  - `_execute_tool` dispatch branch
  - `VALID_TOOL_NAMES`
  - `all_tools` set used for ReACT coverage hints
  - prompt text that currently says “4 tools”
  - [report_agent.py:475](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_lb36j5_z/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:475)
  - [report_agent.py:918](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_lb36j5_z/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:918)
  - [report_agent.py:955](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_lb36j5_z/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:955)
  - [report_agent.py:1064](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_lb36j5_z/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1064)
  - [report_agent.py:1289](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_lb36j5_z/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/report_agent.py:1289)

- Optional but useful: add a debug endpoint under report tools, similar to existing debug tool routes.
  - [report.py:928](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_lb36j5_z/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/api/report.py:928)

- Frontend updates for tool display metadata/log rendering and the “4 tools” card copy.
  - [Step4Report.vue:495](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_lb36j5_z/MiroFish-main-codeIR/frontend/src/components/Step4Report.vue:495)
  - [Step5Interaction.vue:158](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_lb36j5_z/MiroFish-main-codeIR/frontend/src/components/Step5Interaction.vue:158)

Complexity estimate:

- Backend-only tool integration: low to medium (roughly half day).
- Backend + polished UI/log presentation + tests: medium (about 1 day).

No schema/storage migration appears necessary. The report system already logs generic tool calls/results and stores report content as files.

results.prompt:
When a simulation finishes and I search report features, everything from the
last session isn't there or is partly there. I have to wait for it to have
everything. What's going on there?
bash_commands: codeir search "simulation finish report search session" --category core_logic
codeir search "finish completed status done" --category router
codeir grep "class ZepToolsService|def search_graph|def add_batch_episodes|add_episode" --path backend/app/services -C 3
codeir_commands: codeir search "simulation finish report search session" --category core_logic
codeir search "finish completed status done" --category router
codeir grep "class ZepToolsService|def search_graph|def add_batch_episodes|add_episode" --path backend/app/services -C 3

codeir_invocations.command: codeir search "simulation finish report search session" --category core_logic
codeir_invocations.subject: simulation finish report search session

codeir_invocations.command: codeir search "finish completed status done" --category router
codeir_invocations.subject: finish completed status done

codeir_invocations.command: codeir grep "class ZepToolsService|def search_graph|def add_batch_episodes|add_episode" --path backend/app/services -C 3
codeir_invocations.subject: class ZepToolsService|def search_graph|def add_batch_episodes|add_episode

results.final_response:
You’re hitting an async consistency gap, not a bad search query.

`runner_status` is marked `COMPLETED` before graph-memory ingestion is fully drained:

1. Completion is set early in [`simulation_runner.py`](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_b_qedm7l/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/simulation_runner.py:523) and also on `simulation_end` events at [`simulation_runner.py`](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_b_qedm7l/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/simulation_runner.py:633).
2. Only after that, in `finally`, it stops/flushed the updater at [`simulation_runner.py`](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_b_qedm7l/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/simulation_runner.py:554).
3. Updater flush is async queue/buffer drain + batched `graph.add` calls at [`zep_graph_memory_updater.py`](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_b_qedm7l/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/zep_graph_memory_updater.py:293) and [`zep_graph_memory_updater.py`](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_b_qedm7l/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/services/zep_graph_memory_updater.py:408).
4. Search endpoint immediately queries graph with no “wait until processed/indexed” step at [`report.py`](/var/folders/nm/n40j16wd57j7_2dhrgmnndsw0000gn/T/benchmark_repo_b_qedm7l/MiroFish-main-codeIR/backend/app/api/report.py:957).

So right after “simulation finished,” search can be partial; after a short delay, it catches up.

If you want, I can patch this so completion is only exposed after flush (and optionally after Zep processing confirmation).
